The farm

Living land.
Honest food.

Pula Nala — good rain in Setswana — is a family-owned working farm and venue in the peaceful outskirts of Pretoria.

Nine hectares of seasonal produce, open sky, and unhurried calm. A place designed to slow you down and feed you well.

Family-owned 9 Hectares Seasonal produce Private events

What we offer

Three ways to arrive.

Each experience is shaped by the land and the season. Nothing is fixed. Everything is honest.

01

Family Forage Challenge

Walk the land, follow the clues, gather your ingredients, build the fire, cook your potjie, share the table. Limited to fifteen families.

Price on request
02

Grounded Seasonal Dining

An intimate table celebrating what the earth produces right now. No printed menu. Seats no more than sixteen guests at a time.

Contact us for upcoming dates
03

Farm Day Visit

Wander the land, breathe open air, eat food from the earth. A quiet, unhurried day for individuals, couples, and families.

Price on request

From the earth

Abundance
feeds many.

Everything at Pula Nala grows from this soil. Pulled from the ground, brought to the table — the cycle of good food is as honest as it gets.

Come and see where your food begins. Walk the land. Get your hands dirty. Leave full.

Our experiences

A place that looks
like it feels.

Winterveld · Pretoria

Every detail, considered.

Arrive somewhere different.

Pula Nala

"Look where water gives life.
Find what grows unseen.
Abundance feeds many."

Find us

Get in
touch.

For group bookings, custom events, or any enquiry — we respond personally to every message.

Location Winterveld, Pretoria North, Gauteng
Email info@pulanala.farm
WhatsApp +27 72 991 1691
Web pulanala.farm

Hours

Saturday and Sunday, 9am – 4pm. Weekday visits available for groups by prior arrangement.

Getting here

Precise directions are shared once your booking is confirmed. Winterveld is best reached by private vehicle.

What to bring

Comfortable shoes for walking the land, a sense of curiosity, and an appetite. Everything else is taken care of.

Children

Fully welcome. Little ones especially love Nala's Herb Garden and the family forage trails.
